summary: Fresh profiler evidence for the current auto c4/c8 paths after c4 native full-attention and c8 selected-c1 fallback promotion. c4 is generated-token green and launches the native batch full-attention context kernel; c8 is generated-token green and launches the non-retained per-row full-attention context kernel. No retained c>N performance/scaling claim is made.

profiles.raw_trace_not_retained_reason: raw rocprof CSV is large and intentionally left under /tmp; this compact artifact records aggregate evidence only
batch_execution_blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
full-attention decode used a per-row fallback, so this is not native c-aware decode
projection dispatch: no c-aware projection candidate applies to this row count

retained_claim_blockers: c8 current auto path still uses non-native-c-aware per-row full-attention fallback
projection dispatch remains blocked for retained c>N rows
no retained throughput/scaling claim is made

commands.profile_c4: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-current-profile-iter123-c4 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --batch-size 4 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-current-profiled-iter123-c4.json
commands.profile_c8: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-current-profile-iter123-c8 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-current-profiled-iter123-c8.json
commands.active_verify: active loop verify command at clean commit 919987bf returned metric 137
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
